body: The bead is already at decomposition depth 3 per the execution instructions, but the contract requires a split-first pass for this 11-AC, multi-subsystem intake-gate feature. Because this worktree is not allowed to create another child layer, I cannot safely decompose or implement the bead without violating the depth cap. Follow-up needs a higher-level orchestration pass to split the bead into smaller, depth-legal children with standalone AC maps before any implementation work can begin.
